category_sources: Official README says ruby-install installs Ruby, JRuby, TruffleRuby, or mruby.
source_facts.description says it installs Ruby, JRuby, Rubinius, TruffleRuby, or mruby.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is ruby-install.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides synopsis, requirements, install instructions, and links its wiki for known issues.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/postmodern/ruby-install; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official README topics and feature list include ruby, jruby, truffleruby, installer, and bash utility.
